headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Adam Kramer   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $117 to $120.
